sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93264" key="sapri/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαπρ-ίας</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἶνος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n93264.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">old, mellow</tr_> wine (v. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σαπρός</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.3</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:82:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">82.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
